testcase.name: certificate_expiry [https://ldes.telraam-api.net/locations]

testcase.name: access_control_allow_origin [http://edan.si.edu/saam/sparql] [lenient]
testcase.system-out: OPTIONS http://edan.si.edu/saam/sparql with Origin: https://vliz.be Followed 1 redirect(s) to https://edan.si.edu/saam/sparql access-control-allow-origin: '*'

testcase.name: access_control_allow_origin [http://vocab.nerc.ac.uk/sparql/sparql] [lenient]
testcase.system-out: OPTIONS http://vocab.nerc.ac.uk/sparql/sparql with Origin: https://vliz.be access-control-allow-origin: '*'

testcase.name: access_control_allow_origin [https://linked.bodc.ac.uk/sdn/edios/sparql/sparql] [lenient]
testcase.system-out: OPTIONS https://linked.bodc.ac.uk/sdn/edios/sparql/sparql with Origin: https://vliz.be access-control-allow-origin: '*'

testcase.name: access_control_allow_origin [https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query] [lenient]
testcase.system-out: OPTIONS https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query with Origin: https://vliz.be access-control-allow-origin: 'https://vliz.be'

testcase.name: access_control_allow_origin [https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query] [*]

failure.message: access-control-allow-origin does not allow all origins

testcase.system-out: OPTIONS https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query with Origin: https://vliz.be access-control-allow-origin: 'https://vliz.be'

testcase.name: access_control_allow_methods [https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query]
testcase.system-out: OPTIONS https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query (checking allow-methods) access-control-allow-methods: 'GET,POST,DELETE,PUT,HEAD,OPTIONS,PATCH'

testcase.name: access_control_expose_headers [https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query]
testcase.system-out: GET https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query (checking expose-headers) access-control-expose-headers: 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin,Access-Control-Allow-Credentials'

testcase.name: https_redirect [https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query]

failure.message: CORS header missing in redirect chain

testcase.system-out: GET http://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query (checking https redirect) HTTP→HTTPS redirect: http://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query → https://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query (301) access-control-allow-origin at http://sparql.ifremer.fr/csr/query: ''

failure.message: access-control-allow-origin does not allow all origins

testcase.system-out: OPTIONS https://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query with Origin: https://vliz.be access-control-allow-origin: 'https://vliz.be'

testcase.system-out: OPTIONS https://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query (checking allow-methods) access-control-allow-methods: 'GET,POST,DELETE,PUT,HEAD,OPTIONS,PATCH'

testcase.name: access_control_expose_headers [https://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query]
testcase.system-out: GET https://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query (checking expose-headers) access-control-expose-headers: 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin,Access-Control-Allow-Credentials'

testcase.name: https_redirect [https://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query]

failure.message: CORS header missing in redirect chain

testcase.system-out: GET http://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query (checking https redirect) HTTP→HTTPS redirect: http://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query → https://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query (301) access-control-allow-origin at http://sparql.ifremer.fr/sextant_seadatanet/query: ''

skipped.message: probe-origin ('http://edan.si.edu') must not be the same origin as the URL. Set probe-origin to an external origin to avoid masking server misconfigurations.

testcase.name: content_negotiation [http://marineregions.org/feed] [text/turtle]
testcase.system-out: GET http://marineregions.org/feed Accept: text/turtle Status: 200 Content-Type: text/turtle; charset=UTF-8; Parsed response content-type: 'text/turtle'

testcase.name: body_conformity [http://marineregions.org/feed] [text/turtle]
testcase.system-out: Checking body conformity for content-type 'text/turtle' Body conforms.

testcase.name: content_negotiation [http://marineregions.org/feed] [application/ld+json, application/trig;q=0.98, text/turtle;q=0.95, application/n-quads;q=0.9, application/n-triples;q=0.9, application/rdf+xml;q=0.5, text/html;q=0.3, */*;q=0.1]
testcase.system-out: GET http://marineregions.org/feed Accept: application/ld+json, application/trig;q=0.98, text/turtle;q=0.95, application/n-quads;q=0.9, application/n-triples;q=0.9, application/rdf+xml;q=0.5, text/html;q=0.3, */*;q=0.1 Status: 200 Content-Type: application/ld+json; charset=UTF-8; Parsed response content-type: 'application/ld+json'

testcase.name: body_conformity [http://marineregions.org/feed] [application/ld+json, application/trig;q=0.98, text/turtle;q=0.95, application/n-quads;q=0.9, application/n-triples;q=0.9, application/rdf+xml;q=0.5, text/html;q=0.3, */*;q=0.1]
testcase.system-out: Checking body conformity for content-type 'application/ld+json' Body conforms.

property.name: accept-header
property.value: application/ld+json, application/trig;q=0.98, text/turtle;q=0.95, application/n-quads;q=0.9, application/n-triples;q=0.9, application/rdf+xml;q=0.5, text/html;q=0.3, */*;q=0.1
